system_metadata.description: Dynamic, context-aware behavioral scoring rules for Zecpath AI.

calibration_settings.purpose: Establishes a normal resting baseline for the candidate's natural eye movement and head posture to prevent biased scoring.

high_risk.insight: Warning: High frequency of prolonged off-screen gaze or erratic movements detected.

moderate_risk.insight: Occasional loss of focus; potential environmental distractions or nervousness.

low_risk.insight: Candidate is showing strong continuous engagement and appropriate cognitive reflection.
